## Summary
- What changed and why.

## Type of change
- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore

## Validation checklist
- [ ] `cd 10badv && npm run lint`
- [ ] `cd 10badv && npm run test:unit`
- [ ] `cd 10badv && npm run test:integration`
- [ ] `cd 10badv && npm run build`
- [ ] No secrets were added in code or config
- [ ] Related docs updated (if behavior/config changed)

## Deployment impact
- [ ] No infra/env changes
- [ ] Requires env updates
- [ ] Requires DB migration
